title: UK candidate for the International Criminal Court (ICC) elections 2020: Judge Joanna Korner
body: "Following a competitive and open process, Judge Joanna Korner has been selected to be the United Kingdom candidate to fill the vacancy open as Judge Howard Morrison QC completes his term. Judge Korner has extensive judicial experience and expertise in international criminal justice. This page provides an overview of her campaign.  Find out more:   read Judge Korner’s blog  follow Judge Korner on Twitter @JudgeKorner and LinkedIn     Visit Judge Korner’s campaign website: www.judgekornerforicc.com   "
